title: Molten Netherite
description: Netherite is boring, so I changed it to molten metal!
body:
## **Netherite is boring.** 

Personally, I love the vibrant ore colors in Minecraft, so I never liked the switch from vibrant blue to dull gray. 
That is why this pack was born. It turns Netherite into hot molten metal.



![all item forms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db8bb0c3d933a1c0c37dff22b6242ad27edf388c.png)

Here is ingame wearing the armor.

![Ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qmNZOJ3B/images/2cf56cc663e3274a2876060729ab5f92675dc91b.png)

Also check out my other projects! [https://modrinth.com/user/Mootthew](https://modrinth.com/user/Mootthew)
